assertions.description: Output includes a primary Flux prompt with specific lighting setup (where light comes from and what it reveals) and shadow-to-light ratio described
A negative prompt is provided targeting the specific aesthetic's common failure modes
An alternative prompt exploring a different register of the same aesthetic is included

assertion_results.note: Primary prompt specifies single overhead light source, 80% shadow ratio
Negative prompt excludes bright light, color, horror kitsch, HDR
Alternative explores gothic register of same interrogation scene
Prompt includes specific light sources (streetlamps, reflections) with shadow ratio
Negative prompt targets common rain-scene failures
Alternative shifts to warmer noir register
Moonlight through broken windows specified as key source, 85% shadow
Negative prompt excludes horror, oversaturation, modern elements
Alternative explores industrial/brutalist register of same venue

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
